Alert… G808339 - my experience with BMW North America and BMW Group (Global)… they advertise quality products and I trusted their brand for 35+ years till I had to reach out recently.  Trust me, unless you have a warranty, you are no one and they will  refuse to stand by their brand!

Mercedes-Benz is one of the most famous and respected automobile manufacturers in the world. The company was born from the invention of the first gasoline-powered car in 1886 by Karl Benz. Since then, Mercedes-Benz has become a global symbol of luxury, safety, innovation, and engineering excellence. Throughout its history, the brand has introduced groundbreaking technologies that shaped the modern automotive industry, including safety systems, advanced engines, and premium design.
How many patents does Mercedes-Benz have?
Mercedes-Benz and its parent company (Daimler/Mercedes-Benz Group) have registered more than 90,000 patents worldwide over the years, covering automotive safety, electric mobility, engines, autonomous driving, and advanced technologies.

Throughout its history, the brand has introduced groundbreaking technologies that shaped the modern automotive industry, including safety systems, advanced engines, and premium design.
How many patents does Mercedes-Benz have?
Mercedes-Benz and its parent company (Daimler/Mercedes-Benz Group) have registered more than 90,000 patents worldwide over the years, covering automotive safety, electric mobility, engines, autonomous driving, and advanced technologies.

Hello kind people...
It is very hard for me to write this, but I have no other choice...
My family and I are going through an extremely difficult time. Our lives changed in an instant — we lost everything we had, and now we are left with a heavy burden of debt. Every day I struggle, not knowing what to do or how to find a way out...
Honestly, asking for help is not easy for me. But I am forced to do so...
Please, if you have any opportunity, lend us a helping hand. Even the smallest support from you could mean the world to us. What may seem small to you could completely change our lives...
I still believe that there are kind-hearted people out there, and that is why I am reaching out...
Please help us...
May God bless you for your kindness.
